_comment: Copy to plutus.budgets.json and set the real starting credit for each provider that has NO live balance API. Plutus computes remaining = budget_usd - all-time ledger spend. Recalibrate anytime with: python3 plutus.py --calibrate anthropic=NN.NN

anthropic.note: set to your Anthropic console credit

google.note: set to your Google AI Studio / Vertex credit

models._comment: Optional: override hardcoded model IDs for each provider. Plutus_route uses these when routing. Omit to use defaults.
